sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Block at rows 35-36, cols 29-32
# Move RIGHT to reach gray space at cols 33-38
result = action(['RIGHT', 'RIGHT', 'RIGHT'])
print(f"After RIGHTx3: done={last_action_result.get('done')}, level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'O':
        print(f"  Orange: boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check what's around the block
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== Around block (rows 30-45, cols 25-45) ===")
for i in range(30, 46):
    segment = ascii_lines[i][25:45]
    print(f"  Row {i:2d}: '{segment}'")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
